title: When you realize that you’re the senior dev now.
summary: A lighthearted video from Google for Developers featuring Pete King discussing the experience of becoming a senior developer. The content reflects on career advancement and professional maturity in software engineering.
writeup: This Google for Developers short features Pete King reflecting on the experience of becoming a senior developer. The tone is lighthearted, and the focus is career advancement and professional maturity in software engineering. The takeaway centers on recognizing the shift in role and responsibility that comes with seniority rather than technical instruction.
